message:
test(syscall): signalfd4 zero-sigsetsize + renameat2 exchange null-newpath raw parity (bd-uid4, bd-qjl2a)

bd-uid4  signalfd4_zero_sizemask_with_valid_mask_is_einval
         signalfd4(-1, &mask, 0, 0) must surface EINVAL — the kernel
         rejects zero sigsetsize before dereferencing the mask.

bd-qjl2a raw-syscall complement to the ABI-layer test shipped in
         9feb873. renameat2(AT_FDCWD, ".", AT_FDCWD, NULL,
         RENAME_EXCHANGE) must surface EFAULT — the kernel
         dereferences the destination path before flag-aware dispatch,
         so EXCHANGE cannot rescue a bad pointer.

Verification (rch + CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_cc):
  cargo test -p frankenlibc-core --test syscall_veneer_test \
             signalfd4_zero_sizemask                            1 passed
  cargo test -p frankenlibc-core --test syscall_veneer_test \
             renameat2_exchange_null                            1 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-core --tests -- -D warnings       clean
  cargo fmt --check                                              clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
